mapper.sql: fad.real_name, fad.path, fad.avater_size, fad.source, fad.source_id, fad.type, fad.id, fad.enabled_flag, fad.update_time, fad.update_by, fad.create_time, fad.create_by

${tAlias}.real_name as ${tAlias}_real_name, ${tAlias}.path as ${tAlias}_path, ${tAlias}.avater_size as ${tAlias}_avater_size, ${tAlias}.source as ${tAlias}_source, ${tAlias}.source_id as ${tAlias}_source_id, ${tAlias}.type as ${tAlias}_type, ${tAlias}.id as ${tAlias}_id, ${tAlias}.enabled_flag as ${tAlias}_enabled_flag, ${tAlias}.update_time as ${tAlias}_update_time, ${tAlias}.update_by as ${tAlias}_update_by, ${tAlias}.create_time as ${tAlias}_create_time, ${tAlias}.create_by as ${tAlias}_create_by
mapper.insert: insert into fnd_attached_document (real_name, path, avater_size, source, source_id, type, enabled_flag, update_time, update_by, create_time, create_by) values (#{realName,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{path,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{avaterSize,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{source,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{sourceId,jdbcType=BIGINT}, #{type,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{enabledFlag,jdbcType=BIT}, #{updateTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, #{updateBy,jdbcType=BIGINT}, #{createTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, #{createBy,jdbcType=BIGINT})
mapper.update: update fnd_attached_document set real_name = #{realName,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, path = #{path,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, avater_size = #{avaterSize,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, source = #{source,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, source_id = #{sourceId,jdbcType=BIGINT}, type = #{type,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, update_time = #{updateTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, update_by = #{updateBy,jdbcType=BIGINT} where id = #{id,jdbcType=BIGINT}
